name: Fenix 2 MAX Vaporizer
summary: The convection Fenix with a larger battery, USB-C and a dual OLED display, for patients who want all-day runtime and clean flavour.
description: The Fenix 2 MAX is the upgraded version of the Fenix 2.0, keeping the AIR HEATING convection system but adding the things daily users actually ask for. The battery grows to 4800mAh — about 20% more runtime — charging moves to USB-C, and a dual OLED screen shows live temperature and a session timer. A fully insulated stainless steel air path with integrated cooling keeps draws smooth, and the magnetic mouthpiece makes cleaning easy. Temperature runs 160 to 220C with an adjustable 3-7 minute timer. For a UK patient who wants combustion-free convection flavour with modern charging and clear feedback, this is the one to pick over the 2.0.
